---
title: "sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul"
generated: true
description: "Sectioned-ELL semiring matrix multiplication."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.ell_sectioned`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul -->
```python
sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul(sectioned: SectionedELL, B: Num[Array, 'n_cols ncol'], *, semiring: Semiring[Any] = REAL, backend: Backend = 'auto') -> Num[Array, 'm ncol']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul -->
Sectioned-ELL semiring matrix multiplication.

For each bucket, run [`semiring_ell_matmul`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd) and
scatter the result back to the original row positions.  The bucket loop is
Python-level (one trace per bucket); scatter-back uses
`jnp.zeros(...).at[row_indices].set(...)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `sectioned` | `SectionedELL` | — | — | The bucketed adjacency. |
| `B` | `Num` | `n_cols` × `ncol` | — | Dense right operand, `(n_cols, ncol)`. |
| `semiring` | `Semiring[Any]` | — | `REAL` | Algebra to reduce under. |
| `backend` | `Backend` | — | `'auto'` | `"auto"`, `"pallas-cuda"`, or `"jax"`. Passed through to the per-bucket [`semiring_ell_matmul`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd) calls. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `m` × `ncol`. The dense result, shape `(n_rows, ncol)`, with each bucket's rows scattered back to their original positions.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul -->
::: {.callout-note}
Empty rows (degree 0) live in bucket 0 with all-identity
values; their output is the algebra's identity, broadcast over
`ncol`.  This is consistent with "no neighbours -> no
contribution".

For the [`LOG`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd) and `TROPICAL_*` algebras with
`-inf` / `+inf` identities, empty rows produce `-inf` / `+inf`
outputs respectively, which is the algebra-correct answer.
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_cols` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ncol` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
